skillsphere.description: A fullstack e-learning application built with Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB. It allows users to create courses, track progress, and interact with educational materials in real time.

personal-finance-app.description: A fullstack application that helps users manage their personal finances, built with Next.js, Node.js, and MongoDB. It enables budgeting, expense tracking, and supports saving money through an intuitive interface.

audiophile-shop.description: A frontend e-commerce store built with React offering a wide selection of high-quality audio equipment. Users can browse products, add items to the cart, and complete purchases through an intuitive interface.
